name: Tsunami
description: Summon forth a destructive wall of water.
detailLines: 225%-275% magic damage to the primary target.
Applies Tsunami's 30.6-second magic crit adrenaline status.
While active, magic critical strikes generate an additional 8% adrenaline.
Incite Fear Glacial Embrace stacks reduce Tsunami's adrenaline cost by 12% per stack, up to 60%.
